CVE-2014-9157.title: Format string vulnerability in the yyerror function in lib/cgraph ...
CVE-2014-9157.description: Format string vulnerability in the yyerror function in lib/cgraph/scan.l in Graphviz allows remote attackers to have unspecified impact via format string specifiers in unknown vectors, which are not properly handled in an error string.

CVE-2019-11023.title: The agroot() function in cgraph\obj.c in libcgraph.a in Graphviz  ...
CVE-2019-11023.description: The agroot() function in cgraph\obj.c in libcgraph.a in Graphviz 2.39.20160612.1140 has a NULL pointer dereference, as demonstrated by graphml2gv.

CVE-2019-9904.title: An issue was discovered in lib\cdt\dttree.c in libcdt.a in graphv ...
CVE-2019-9904.description: An issue was discovered in lib\cdt\dttree.c in libcdt.a in graphviz 2.40.1. Stack consumption occurs because of recursive agclose calls in lib\cgraph\graph.c in libcgraph.a, related to agfstsubg in lib\cgraph\subg.c.

CVE-2020-18032.title: Buffer Overflow in Graphviz Graph Visualization Tools from commit ...
CVE-2020-18032.description: Buffer Overflow in Graphviz Graph Visualization Tools from commit ID f8b9e035 and earlier allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code or cause a denial of service (application crash) by loading a crafted file into the "lib/common/shapes.c" component.
